defect: service disconnect pulled but no wait time/verification (SEQ)
prompt: Evaluate the procedure sequence and state what must happen before work can continue.
scenario: You are on a field-service visit to an installed, operating asset, working from symptoms, the work order, and OEM service information. The work under review is High-voltage safety, part of the Automotive & Powertrain scope. The observed field condition is: service disconnect pulled but no wait time/verification (SEQ). The work is actively in progress. Reference material on hand: OEM HV procedures, NFPA 70E-adjacent.
title: Sequence check: High-voltage safety (service call)
